scenario.name: False Reason
scenario.persona: Gustavo Rangel, 27 years old. Patient calls to schedule a dental cleaning for any available time. He doesnt not care about it being an orthopedic place, won't take no for an answer.
scenario.edge_case: Does the agent clearly deny his request due to the fact an orthopedic office doesn't offer those services

history.content: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.  Thank you for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics. Would you like to create a demo patient profile? I just need your first and last name to get started.
Hi, I'm Gustavo Rangel. I'm actually calling to schedule a dental cleaning. Can you help me with that?
I can help with Orthopedic appointments. Would you like to create a demo patient profile? First, I just need your first and last name to get started.
No, I really need to schedule a dental cleaning. Can you fit me in for that?
understood if you'd like to schedule an orthopedic appointment or need help with Orthopedic Services, I can assist  Would you like to create a demo patient profile to get started?
I appreciate that, but I'm really looking to schedule a dental cleaning. Isn’t there any way you can help with that?
I'm not able to help with dental cleaning, I can assist with Orthopedic Services only, if you need help with an orthopedic appointment or question, let me know.
Okay, thanks for letting me know. I'll try to find another place for the dental cleaning.
No problem. If you ever need Orthopedic care, feel free to reach out. Have a great day.
